name: Papa Louie 3
author: Poki
description: Papa Louie 3 is the coolest (and craziest) adventure yet in the Papa Louie series! This time, evil ice cream sundaes have taken over the Seaside Freezeria, and it’s up to you to rescue Papa’s restaurant crew from the frosty chaos. Armed with trusty cooking utensils, jump, swing, and battle your way through dangerous dessert-filled levels. Collect coins, free your friends, and dodge brain-freezing enemies to save the day! Can you melt the madness and defeat the frozen foes? How to play Papa Louie 3? Walk: the left and right arrow key Jump: the up arrow key Attack: the space bar Slide: the down arrow key Who created Papa Louie 3? Papa Louie 2 is created by Flipline Games. Play their other game on Poki: Papa Louie: When Pizzas Attack , papas-louie-2, Papa's Pizzeria , Papa's Scooperia and Papa's Freezeria ! How can I play Papa Louie 3 for free? You can play Papa Louie 3 for free on Poki. Can I play Papa Louie 3 on mobile devices and desktop? Papa Louie 3 can be played on your computer.
